descript.abstract: The TrailNFS_Publish Layer is designed to provide information about National Forest System trail locations and characteristics to the public. When fully realized, it will describe trail locations, basic characteristics of the trail, and where and when various trail uses are prohibited, allowed and encouraged. Because the data readiness varies between Forests, each Forest will approve which level of attribute subset are published for that forest. Forests can provide no information or one of three attribute subsets describing trails. The attribute subsets include TrailNFS_Centerline which includes the location and trail name and number; TrailNFS_Basic which adds information about basic trail characteristics; and TrailNFS_Mgmt which adds information about where and when users are prohibited, allowed, and encouraged. When a Forest chooses to provide the highest attribute subset, TrailNFS_Mgmt, these attributes must be consistent with the Forest's published Motorized Vehicle Use Map (MVUM).
descript.purpose: The TrailNFS_Publish Layer is designed to provide information about National Forest System trail locations and characteristics to the public. When fully realized, it will describe trail locations, basic characteristics of the trail, and where and when various trail uses are prohibited, allowed and encouraged. Because the data readiness varies between Forests, each Forest will approve which level of attribute subset are published for that forest. Forests can provide no information or one of three attribute subsets describing trails. The attribute subsets include TrailNFS_Centerline which includes the location and trail name and number; TrailNFS_Basic which adds information about basic trail characteristics; and TrailNFS_Mgmt which adds information about where and when users are prohibited, allowed, and encouraged. When a Forest chooses to provide the highest attribute subset, TrailNFS_Mgmt, these attributes must be consistent with the Forest's published Motorized Vehicle Use Map (MVUM).

idinfo.useconst: The USDA Forest Service makes no claims, promises, or guarantees about the accuracy, completeness, or adequacy of the content; and expressly disclaims liability for errors and omissions. No warranty of any kind, implied, expressed or statutory, including but not limited to warranties of non-infringement of third party rights, title, merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose and freedom from computer virus, is given with respect to the contents or hyperlinks to other Internet resources. Reference to any specific commercial products, processes, or services, or the use of any trade, firm or corporation name is for the information and convenience of the public, and does not constitute endorsement or recommendation by the USDA Forest Service.

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

enttyp.enttypd: A collection of geographic features with the same geometry type (such as point, line, or polygon), the same attributes, and the same spatial reference.

attr.attrdef: Internal feature number.

attrdomv.udom: Sequential unique whole numbers that are automatically generated.

attr.attrdef: The name that the trail or trail segment is officially or legally known by.

attrdomv.udom: Name of trail.

attr.attrdef: A (required) category that reflects the predominant trail surface and general mode of travel accommodated by a trail

edom.edomvd: A trail that has a surface consisting predominantly of snow or ice and that is designed and managed to accommodate use on that surface.
A trail that has a surface consisting predominantly of water (but may include land-based portages) and that is designed and managed to accommodate use on that surface.
A trail that has a surface consisting predominantly of the ground and that is designed and managed to accommodate use on that surface.

attr.attrdef: Control number generated in Oracle to uniquely identify each trail across all Forest Service units.

attrdomv.udom: Trail control number.

attr.attrdef: Beginning measure point for the segment.

attrdomv.udom: Beginning measure point for the segment.

attr.attrdef: End measure point for the trail segment.

attrdomv.udom: End measure point for the trail segment.

attr.attrdef: The length of the trail or trail segment in miles. Calculated as EMP - BMP

attrdomv.udom: Length of the trail segment.

attr.attrdef: The administrative unit within the Forest Service where the trail or trail segment physically resides.

attrdomv.udom: The six digit code is composed of a two digit Region code, a two digit National Forest code, and a two digit Ranger District code.

attr.attrdef: The Forest Service administrative unit that has the long-term responsibility for the management of the trail or trail segment.

attrdomv.udom: The six digit code is composed of a two digit Region code, a two digit National Forest code, and a two digit Ranger District code.

attr.attrdef: Security ID is automatically populated in the source data base with the organization code the editor belongs to, as recorded in Infra, and can be used to filter which trail records a user has access to edit.

attrdomv.udom: Security ID is automatically populated with the organization code the editor belongs to, as recorded in Infra.

attr.attrdef: Describes which attribute subset is populated for this record. The attribute subset chosen for each National Forest depends on the data readiness of the trails data for that National Forest.

edom.edomvd: Includes only existing NFSTs, Trail Name, Trail Number, and BMP/EMP length

Includes only existing NFSTs and attributes in EDW TrailNFS_Centerline subset, plus basic trail data including Trail Class, accessibility status, trail surface, national trail designation, year last maintained and attributes that describe the basic characterization of the trail.
Includes only existing NFSTs and attributes in EDW TrailNFS_Basic subset, plus Access and Travel Management data for motorized and non-motorized uses (managed, accepted, prohibited uses).

attr.attrdef: The national designation assigned to the trail or trail segment. This includes designations by federal statute for National Historic Trails (NHT), National Scenic Trails (NST), Connecting or Side Trails (C-S), and National Recreation Trails (NRT); and also includes National Millennium Trails (NMT) and Millennium Legacy Trails (MLT).

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this attribute subset level
Not designated as a National Trail
All other National Trails
National Scenic or National Historic Trail

attr.attrdef: The prescribed scale of development for a trail, representing its intended design and management standards (TC 1 to 5)

edom.edomvd: Minimally developed
Moderately developed
Developed
Highly developed
Fully developed
Not populated in this Attribute Subset
Not recorded for this trail segment.

attr.attrdef: Accessibility guideline compliance status for trail segments that are designed for hiker/pedestrian use.

edom.edomvd: Trail determined ineligible to meet current agency accessibility guidelines
Trail meets current agency accessibility guidelines
Trail not evaluated for accessibility
Not recorded for this Attribute Subset

attr.attrdef: The predominant surface type the user would expect to encounter on the trail or trail segment.

edom.edomvd: Imported material such as gravel surface
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Snow surface
Asphalt surface
Not recorded
Native material surface

attr.attrdef: The firmness characteristics of the surface that the user would generally expect to encounter on the trail or trail segment.

edom.edomvd: Trail surface is generally firm
Not recorded
Trail surface is generally very soft
Trail surface is paved
Trail surface is generally soft
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Trail surface is generally hard.

attr.attrdef: The grade that the user would generally expect to encounter along the trail segment. The typical trail grade classes used by the USFS have been combined when they indicate the same grade but in different directions.

edom.edomvd: Typical trail grade is 0-5%
Typical trail grade is 5-8 %
Typical trail grade is 8-10 %
Typical trail grade is 10-12%
Typical trail grade is 10-12%
Typical trail grade is 20-30%
Typical trail grade is 30-40%
Typical trail grade is 40-50%
Typical trail grade is greater than 50%
Not recorded
Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attr.attrdef: The average tread width the user can generally expect on the section of trail.

attrdomv.udom: Code describes the typical trail tread width in inches. For example the code "< 6 INCHES" indicates that the tread width is less than 6 inches, "10 INCHES" indicates the tread width is about 10 inches, and "> 42 INCHES" indicates the tread width is generally wider than 42 inches. "N/A" indicates the attribute is not populated for this Attribute Subtype and blank indicates the value has not been recorded for this trail segment.

attr.attrdef: The minimum trail width on the trail segment where passage may be physically restricted and no alternative route is readily available.

attrdomv.udom: Code describes the minimum trail width in inches. For example the code "< 6 INCHES" indicates that the width is less than 6 inches in some places; "10 INCHES" indicates the minimum trail width is about 10 inches, and "> 42 INCHES" indicates the minimum trail width is generally wider than 42 inches. "N/A" indicates the attribute is not populated for this Attribute Subtype and blank indicates the value has not been recorded for this trail segment.

attr.attrdef: The tread cross slope that the user would generally expect to encounter on the section of trail. Entered in percent.

attrdomv.udom: Code describes the typical tread cross slope in percent. For example the code "0%" indicates that the tread cross slope is 0 percent or in other words that the trail is crossing flat ground; "4%" indicates the tread cross slope is about 4percent; "10-15%" indicates the tread cross slope is between 10 and 15 percent and ">20%" indicates the tread cross slope is generally steeper than 20 percent. "N/A" indicates the attribute is not populated for this Attribute Subtype and blank indicates the value has not been recorded for this trail segment.

attr.attrdef: Land area, that may be of special management concern or interest, through which the trail or trail segment crosses.

edom.edomvd: Trail segment is in a Research Natural Area
Trail segment is in an Wilderness Study Area
Trail segment is in an Unroaded Area
Trail segment is in a National Monument
Trail segment is in an Inventoied Roadless Area
Trail segment is in a Recreation section of a Wild and Scenic River corridor
Trail segment is in a Scenic section of a WIld and Scenic River corridor
Trail segment is in a Wilderness Area.
Trail segment is in a National Recreation Area
Trail segment is in a Wild section of a WIld and Scenic River corridor
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Trail is not in a special management area

attr.attrdef: This field indicates the Trail Class, or development scale, of the TERRA trail or trail segment

edom.edomvd: Minimally developed (Trail Class 1) or Moderately developed (Trail Class 2) trail or trail segment
Developed (Trail Class 3) trail or trail segment
Highly developed (Trail Class 4) or Fully developed (Trail Class 5) trail or trail segment
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: This field indicates the vehicle class or combination of vehicle classes to which the trail is open (Trail open Yearlong or Seasonal: to all vehicles; to vehicles 50" or less in width; to motorcycles; special designation)

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Roads open to all Vehicles, Yearlong
Roads open to all Vehicles, Seasonal
Roads open to highway legal vehicles only, Yearlong
Roads open to highway legal vehicles only, Seasonal
Trails open to all vehicles, Yearlong
Trails open to all vehicles, Seasonal
Trails open to vehicles 50" or less in width, Yearlong
Trails open to vehicles 50" or less in width, Seasonal
Trails open to motorcycles, Yearlong
Trails open to motorcycles, Seasonal
Special Designation, Yearlong
Special Designation Seasonal
Interstate
State or US Highway
Other Public Road
Wheeled OHV <50", Yearlong
Wheeled OHV <50", Seasonal
Other Public Trails - Not In Infra
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: This field supports basic display of motorized and non-motorized TERRA trails:

edom.edomvd: Designated as open to one or more motorized uses, year-round or seasonally
Designated as closed to all motorized uses year-round
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: This field supports basic display of motorized and non-motorized SNOW trails

edom.edomvd: Designated as open to one or more motorized uses, year-round or seasonally
Designated as closed to all motorized uses year-round
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: This field supports basic display of motorized and non-motorized WATER trails

edom.edomvd: Designated as open to one or more motorized uses, year-round or seasonally
Designated as closed to all motorized uses year-round
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: Indicates uses on TERRA Trails that are legally allowed on the trail (e.g. "Where can I take my_?" Formed by concatenating the value for each allowable use. (e.g. 12 states that use1 and 2 are both allowed.)

edom.edomvd: Hiker/Pedestrian
Pack & Saddle
Bicycle
Motorcycle
ATV
Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: Indicates uses on SNOW Trails that are legally allowed on the trail (e.g. "Where can I take my???.") The value for each segment is a concatenated list of the values

edom.edomvd: Snowshoe
Cross-country ski
Snowmobile
Not recorded
Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails that are designed and managed to accommodate hiker/pedestrian use seasonally or year-round

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which trail is managed for hiker/pedestrian use.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where hiker/pedestrian use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which hiker/pedestrian use is accepted.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where hiker/pedestrian use is discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which hiker/pedestrian use is discouraged.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where hiker/pedestrian use is allowed or discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which hiker/pedestrian use is accepted or discouraged.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where hiker/pedestrian use is restricted year-round

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which hiker/pedestrian use is restricted.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails that are designed and managed to accommodate pack & saddle use seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which pack & saddle use are managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where pack & saddle use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where pack & saddle use is allowed or discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this attribute subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which pack & saddle use is accepted or discouraged.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where pack & saddle use is restricted year-round

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which pack & saddle use is restricted.

Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which motorcycle use is discouraged.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which four wheel drive use is managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates TERRA trails where 4 wheel drive, OHVs greater than 50" in width, use is allowed.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset

attr.attrdef: The official numeric or alphanumeric identifier for the trail.

attrdomv.udom: Trail number.

attr.attrdef: Indicates SNOW trails that are designed and managed to accommodate over snow multi-passanger vehicle, greater than 50" in width, use seasonally or year-round

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which over snow multi-passanger vehicle use is managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates SNOW trails where over snow multi-passanger vehicle, greater than 50" in width, use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round.

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset

edom.edomvd: Not populated for this Attribute Subset
Not recorded

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which non-motor watercraft use is restricted.

attr.attrdef: The length of the feature in miles, calculated in North American Albers Equal Area Conic projection (NAD83) meters and then converted to miles with the formula LengthMeters / 1609.344.

attrdomv.udom: Length of the trail segment, in miles, as calculated by the GIS. This can be different than the segment length which can be measured in a variety of ways.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails designed and managed to accommodate to accommodate class 1 e-bike use year-round or seasonally. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 1 e-bike use is managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 1 e-bike use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 1 e-bike use is accepted, but not managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 1 e-bike use is discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 1 e-bike use is discouraged, but not managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 1 e-bike use is restricted year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 1 e-bike use is restricted.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails designed and managed to accommodate class 2 e-bike use year-round or seasonally. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 2 e-bike use is managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 2 e-bike use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 2 e-bike use is accepted, but not managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 2 e-bike use is discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 2 e-bike use is discouraged, but not managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 2 e-bike use is restricted year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 2 e-bike use is restricted.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails designed and managed to accommodate to accommodate class 3 e-bike use year-round or seasonally. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 3 e-bike use is managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 3 e-bike use is allowed, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 3 e-bike use is accepted, but not managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 3 e-bike use is discouraged, but not managed or restricted seasonally or year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 3 e-bike use is discouraged, but not managed.

attr.attrdef: Indicates date range of TERRA trails where class 3 e-bike use is restricted year-round. Format is MM/DD.

attrdomv.udom: Date range for which class 3 e-bike use is restricted.

attr.attrdef: Feature geometry.

attrdomv.udom: Coordinates defining the features.

attr.attrdef: Invalid and blank for SDO Geometry features.

attrdomv.udom: Positive real numbers that are automatically generated

cntorgp.cntorg: USFS Chief Information Office, Enterprise Data Warehouse

cntinfo.cntvoice: Please send an e-mail to the address below.

metainfo.metstdn: FGDC Content Standard for Digital Geospatial Metadata
